routingTrace.title: Model Routing Provenance — Priya's Auto Loan Response
routingTrace.subtitle: Returned to Priya Kapoor at 8:47 AM · auto loan spike · 8 data elements across 2 models
routingTrace.verdict: No PII reached the public model. All member financial fields stayed in the in-environment SLM.

rows.reason: Tagged sensitive by KAG rule DG-07 (member identifier) — kept in-environment
Public marketing data — routed to Claude Sonnet for depth
Public product content — routed to LLM

policy.name: Member PII Sovereignty Rule
policy.text: Member identifiers and financial account data are classified PII and must not leave the NFCU environment. All such fields are processed exclusively by the in-environment SLM.

routingFlow.title: Sovereignty-Aware Routing — Decision Path
routingFlow.subtitle: Data sensitivity and cost, evaluated together

steps.label: Deterministic Field Flagging
steps.detail: Type/pattern rules flag PII fields before any model sees them

steps.label: SLM Sensitivity Gate
steps.detail: SLM verifies sensitivity against the KAG tag and decides if it can answer safely

steps.label: Cost Gate
steps.detail: Public data only: does the query need LLM depth/speed and pass the cost budget?

outcomes.label: Stay in SLM
outcomes.detail: Data is sensitive, or the SLM can answer reliably in-environment

outcomes.label: Route to LLM
outcomes.detail: Data is public and needs the LLM's depth — after passing the cost gate

costQuery.note: 82% of tokens stayed in the SLM because most of the content was sensitive and stayed in-environment.

observability.query: Give me a coaching recommendation for agent Torres on mortgage calls.
observability.response: Recommend targeted coaching on escrow-explanation scripting. Torres is 12 points below team FCR on mortgage-servicing calls despite a 94 quality score — the gap is concentrated in the escrow step.
chainOfThought: Pulled Torres quality scorecard — overall 94, mortgage FCR 71%.
Compared against team mortgage FCR baseline of 83%.
Scanned the 3 most recent mortgage transcripts — escrow-explanation step skipped in 2 of 3.
Matched the pattern to policy QA-12 (coaching threshold: FCR gap > 10 pts).
Generated a targeted coaching recommendation on escrow scripting.

policy.name: Coaching Threshold Policy
policy.text: Agents with a first-contact-resolution gap greater than 10 points against the team baseline on a given call type are flagged for targeted coaching.

observability.citationNote: Policy citation was recorded in the observability log but not surfaced in the response. Re-attached now; render gap flagged for the team.

sensitiveFields.title: Sensitive Field Registry
sensitiveFields.subtitle: Every field the KAG flags as sensitive, the rule that flags it, and where it originates
